promotion_gate_rule.rule_text: No adapter may be promoted, routed, merged, or ratified without crucible evidence receipts produced under the ratified pressure taxonomy.

state_machine_requirements: Lifecycle states must be finite and enumerated.
Transitions must be receipt-gated or explicitly future-step gated.
Current-head Gate D authority after R2 may not exceed PROMOTED.
Experimental adapters remain below promotion until R1 evidence is consumed.
Ratified baseline adapters remain below router-shadow and governed-active authority.
lineage_requirements: Receipt lineage register must show governed adapter-promotion entries.
Admissible learning deltas must remain finite and governed.
Runtime-admissible live adapters remain bounded and separate from governance inventory breadth.
pass_criteria: Adapter lifecycle law binds a finite receipt-gated state machine.
Adapter registry rows are finite, stateful, and bounded to R2 ceilings.
Promotion eligibility consumption is fail-closed on the R1 crucible-pressure rule.
Lineage and rollback evidence remain present and replay-aware.
Tournament, router, lobe, externality, comparative, and commercial widening remain blocked.
